creator: usama.cit@gmail.com
text:
By minimal edition, I mean bare-bone desktop desktop environment. For instance:
1. KDE's minimal edition can be installed by:
pkg install plasma5-plasma
2. And Gnome's minimal edition can be installed by:
pkg install gnome-shell
The Documentation page should mention this, for those of us who want to keep their desktop bare-bones and do not want to install additional (unnecessary packages).
